evidence.claim: Built semantic search infrastructure using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Recently, I built our semantic search infrastructure from scratch — sentence-transformers, FAISS, the works.

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers... with FAISS

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets and metrics
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion)

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for A/B test metrics
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Self-directed learning through shipping real systems
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Earned Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer certification
evidence.source_text: Google Cloud Professional ML Engineer (Google Cloud, 2024)

evidence.claim: Views retrieval problems as evaluation problems
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes business alignment over pure modeling
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target... that work was as important as the modeling itself.
